assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Repository Registry' section with a table listing both 'trustify-backend' (serena_backend) and 'trustify-ui' (serena_ui) as entries
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 3 contains '## Repository Registry'. Line 7: '| trustify-backend | Rust backend service | serena_backend | /home/user/trustify-backend |'. Line 8: '| trustify-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/trustify-ui |'. Both repositories with their Serena instances are present.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Jira Configuration' section with all 5 fields: Project key (TC), Cloud ID, Feature issue type ID (10142), Git Pull Request custom field (customfield_10875), GitHub Issue custom field (customfield_10747)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 10 contains '## Jira Configuration'. Lines 12-16 contain all 5 fields: 'Project key: TC', 'Cloud ID: 2b9e35e3-6bd3-4cec-b838-f4249ee02432', 'Feature issue type ID: 10142', 'Git Pull Request custom field: customfield_10875', 'GitHub Issue custom field: customfield_10747'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Code Intelligence' section that documents the mcp__<instance>__<tool> naming convention
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 18 contains '## Code Intelligence'. Line 20 documents the naming convention: 'Tools are prefixed by Serena instance name: `mcp__<instance>__<tool>`.' Lines 25-29 provide a concrete example using serena_backend.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Limitations' subheading under Code Intelligence
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 31 contains '### Limitations' which appears under the '## Code Intelligence' section (line 18). Line 33 notes: 'No limitations known — no limitations reported for either Serena instance.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md mentions discovering 2 Serena instances (serena_backend and serena_ui) from the MCP tool listing
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md line 9: 'Discovered 2 Serena instances from the MCP tool listing:'. Lines 11-12 list both instances: '1. **serena_backend** — 10 tools available' and '2. **serena_ui** — 10 tools available'. Source identified as MCP tool listing.

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md indicates all sections were newly added (no preserved entries since this is a greenfield setup)
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md line 5: 'This is a greenfield setup. The existing CLAUDE.md had no Project Configuration section, so everything was newly added.' Lines 9-15 list all sections under '## Added': Project Configuration section, Repository Registry (2 entries), Jira Configuration (all 5 fields), Code Intelligence, and Limitations. Line 23: 'Nothing was removed or overwritten.'

assertion_results.text: The Repository Registry table contains columns: Repository, Role, Serena Instance, Path — matching project-config.template.md structure
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 5: '| Repository | Role | Serena Instance | Path |'. These four columns exactly match the template structure. Line 6 is the separator, and lines 7-8 contain data rows following the same column layout.
